allow: Bash(python -c "from app.main import app; print\(''Backend imports OK''\)")
Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(p\) for p in sorted\(d[''''paths''''].keys\(\)\)]")

Bash(powershell.exe -Command "Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 8000 -State Listen | Select-Object LocalAddress,LocalPort,OwningProcess | ForEach-Object { \\$proc = Get-Process -Id \\$_.OwningProcess -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; [PSCustomObject]@{PID=\\$_.OwningProcess; Name=\\$proc.Name; Port=\\$_.LocalPort} }" 2>&1)

Bash(powershell.exe -Command "Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 8000 -State Listen | Select-Object -ExpandProperty OwningProcess | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_ -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }; Write-Host done" 2>&1)

Bash(powershell.exe -Command "
\\$pids = \(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 8000 -State Listen\).OwningProcess
foreach \(\\$id in \\$pids\) { Stop-Process -Id \\$id -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }
Write-Host 'Killed'
" 2>&1)
